step_rationale: Lymphatic regeneration signal post-MI; systemic recovery pathway, not plaque destabilization.
mechanism: EphB4 promotes lymphatic regeneration and cardiac recovery after MI through tissue-repair pathways distinct from atherothrombotic cascade.

references.title: Functions and Regeneration of Mature Cardiac Lymphatic Vessels in Atherosclerosis, Myocardial Infarction, and Heart Failure.
